content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_CurrencyConversion
as
SELECT      DISTINCT C1.CUCD, ARAT
FROM        M3.CCURRA C1
INNER JOIN  (
            SELECT CUCD, MAX(CUTD) as MaxDate
            FROM M3.CCURRA
            WHERE CRTP = '1'
            GROUP BY CUCD
            ) C2 on C1.CUCD = C2.CUCD and C1.CUTD = C2.MaxDate
WHERE       C1.CRTP = '1'
AND         C1.CUCD = 'CAD'

UNION

SELECT      'USD' AS CUCD, 1 AS ARAT
